title: Navigation History, Immutable Snapshots, Back, and Bounded Undo · Spiral Review
summary: A delayed maintainer review reconstructs navigation history, immutable snapshots, back, and bounded undo from revision, runtime, command, unknown input, validation result, request identity, response fixture, promise state, cache decision, output, abort, cleanup, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for bounded immutable navigation timeline after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging,…
objectives: Define back as prior admitted view, not arithmetic or browser history, and expose when no snapshot exists.
Store readonly copied domain snapshots or stable cache identities without shared mutable arrays or pending controllers.
Push only after success, restore without hidden traffic when promised, and cancel or supersede pending operations safely.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
